result.summary: Your responses suggest significant post-traumatic stress symptoms. Multiple areas of your life appear to be affected by your experiences. You indicated challenges related to intrusive memories or flashbacks, avoidance of trauma reminders, heightened alertness or reactivity, difficulty managing intense emotions, negative beliefs about yourself, challenges in close relationships. Consider speaking with a mental health professional who can provide personalized support.
recommendations: When distressing memories arise, focus on your breath and current surroundings
Gradual exposure to avoided situations with support from a therapist
Practice sitting with uncomfortable feelings for short periods to build tolerance
Establish a calming bedtime routine and limit caffeine
Try progressive muscle relaxation or yoga for nervous system regulation
Learn emotion regulation skills through Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)
Create a self-soothing kit with sensory comfort items
Work with a therapist on cognitive restructuring and self-compassion
Practice daily self-affirmations and challenge negative self-talk
Consider relationship counseling or group therapy to rebuild connection skills
Start with small steps: brief conversations with trusted people
